revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing misc last stuff

Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove deleted category User Wiktionary
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23674194100|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{userbox | border-c = #bbb | id = [[Image:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg|40x43px]] | id-c = #fff | info = This user has [[wikt:User:{{{1|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|a page]] on [[wikt:|Wiktionary]]. | info-c = #f6f6f6 | float = {{{float|}}} | id-h = {{{id-height|{{{id-h|45}}}}}} | usercategory = Wikipedians who contribute to Wiktionary | nocat = {{{nocat|}}} }}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTUser Wiktionary]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{userbox | border-c = #bbb | id = [[Image:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg|40x43px]] | id-c = #fff | info = This user has [[wikt:User:{{{1|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|a page]] on [[wikt:|Wiktionary]]. | info-c = #f6f6f6 | float = {{{float|}}} | id-h = {{{id-height|{{{id-h|45}}}}}} | usercategory = Wikipedians who contribute to Wiktionary | nocat = {{{nocat|}}} }}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTUser Wiktionary]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24314731306|commit triggered pipeline]]
